title: UAE-India Leaders Program
description: Immersive leadership exchange for Emirati professionals and university students, traveling to India across cohorts focused on international relations, science/technology/sustainability, and arts/culture/architecture. Run by the Zayed Education Foundation — the next phase's details are shared through the Foundation's official channels rather than a fixed public deadline, so reach out directly to be notified.

title: Ahlan World Language Center Internship (Egypt)
description: Full-time internship (up to 30 hrs/week) at Ahlan World's Arabic-language school in Luxor, Egypt — administration, marketing, student advising, and cultural events. Unpaid: no flights, lodging, or stipend are provided; interns get preferential lesson placement and a 20% discount on Arabic courses instead. Apply by contacting Ahlan World directly — there's no fixed deadline.

title: KSGAAL Arabic Language Immersion Program
description: Two-month intensive Arabic immersion for non-native speakers, run by the King Salman Global Academy for Arabic Language, with field trips, homestays, and real-world practice, across four sessions in 2026. The first edition drew over 8,000 applicants from 70+ nationalities.
org: King Salman Global Academy for Arabic Language (KSGAAL)
visaNote: Participants from visa-required countries will need a Saudi visa; the program's registration site provides guidance.

title: Obama Foundation Scholars Program at Columbia University
description: A prestigious, fully funded academic-year program at Columbia University in New York City for rising leaders worldwide who plan to return home and apply what they learn. Covers a living stipend, a furnished studio apartment, tuition/fees for up to four Columbia courses, health insurance, and international air travel. Recurs annually; the application window for the following year's cohort is typically announced in the fall on the Foundation's own site.
visaNote: J-1 exchange visitor visa sponsored by Columbia University for the program duration.
